title: DAVID — Self-Introduction (Channel Intro)

avatar.note: Reuse the LOCKED DAVID avatar + Archive set for every shot (image_to_video). Host speaks modern English — no attested-text/IPA labels needed; this is DAVID introducing himself.

voice_suffix: mid-low resonant unhurried voice, precise diction, documentary gravitas, Attenborough-calm, accessible, never stuffy

shots.video_prompt: DAVID, keeper of the Archive, seated at his worktable in warm lamplight, looks to camera and speaks calmly, lip-synced. Slow gentle push-in.
shots.speech_text: I am DAVID. I bring dead languages back — not as words on a page, but as sound you can hear.

shots.video_prompt: DAVID, medium shot among shelves of manuscripts and tablets, reflective, lip-synced.
shots.speech_text: For most of history, when a language died, its voice died with it. The words survived. The sound was lost.

shots.video_prompt: DAVID leans slightly toward camera, intent, lip-synced. The signature question.
shots.speech_text: So I ask one question of every silent tongue: what did they actually say?

shots.video_prompt: DAVID, steady close-up, a knowing pause, lip-synced.
shots.speech_text: And how do we prove it?

shots.video_prompt: DAVID gestures to an open codex on the worktable, explaining, lip-synced.
shots.speech_text: I work only from the corpus — the texts people actually left — and reconstruct the sound the evidence supports. Never invention.

shots.video_prompt: DAVID, calm and direct to camera, lip-synced. The honesty principle.
shots.speech_text: When a sound is certain, I say so. When it's reconstructed, I say that too — and I show the proof on screen.

shots.video_prompt: DAVID, a spark of delight, lip-synced; warm light lifts slightly.
shots.speech_text: Here you'll hear Latin, Gothic, Old Norse, Sumerian — tongues no one has spoken aloud in a thousand years.

shots.video_prompt: DAVID, warm and inviting, slight smile, lip-synced; gentle settle.
shots.speech_text: Bring the dead tongues back with me, one attestation at a time. Welcome to the Archive.

cta: Bring the dead tongues back — one attestation at a time. DAVID.
guardrails: Synthetic avatar only; no real-person likeness.
DAVID speaks modern English about himself — no dead-language line in this intro, so no IPA/attestation labels required.
Reuse the locked avatar + Archive set + voice suffix for full consistency.
